overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spacecraft flying over mountainous alien terrain during golden hour. The vehicle transitions from clear atmospheric conditions into a dense fog bank, with visibility dropping significantly. Features a futuristic amber holographic HUD characteristic of high-fidelity space simulation games.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial flight over clear mountain valley

events.description: approaching dense fog bank visible ahead in the valley

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft over mountainous terrain at low altitude, approaching weather front

entered.detail: dark rocky mountain silhouette against the sky
mountain ridge line extending into the distance
bright sun low on the horizon creating orange glow
shadowed canyon floor between mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: Flying through clear atmospheric conditions over a vast mountain valley during golden hour. The sun sits low on the horizon, backlighting the rugged terrain. Distant mountain ranges frame both sides of the valley as the craft approaches a visible fog bank ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial flight through dense atmospheric fog

events.description: entering dense fog bank, visibility drops dramatically
sun becomes diffuse white orb through thick fog, ambient light scatters

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense fog with reduced visibility, relying on instruments

segments.scene_description: Flying through dense atmospheric fog that obscures most of the landscape. The right mountain range and valley floor disappear into the whiteout conditions. The left mountain range draws closer as the craft continues forward, while the sun transforms from a distinct orb into a diffuse glow diffused by the thick fog particles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight through a vast mountain valley that gradually disappears into a dense, blinding fog bank. It begins in clear atmospheric conditions during the golden hour, with the low sun backlighting rugged terrain and distant mountain ranges framing the path ahead. As the craft advances, the scene shifts as it enters a thick wall of mist, causing the valley floor and the right-hand mountains to vanish into a whiteout. The left mountain range draws closer through the haze before the sun finally transforms from a distinct orb into a diffuse, muted glow filtered through the heavy fog particles.
